title: SOPHIAS eye-tracker recording schema
description: Schema for the recording-level metadata file exported from Tobii Pro Glasses 3. The file describes the eye-tracker recording session, including recording identifiers, duration, creation time, timezone, scene-camera video metadata, camera-calibration parameters, gaze-stream metadata, event-stream metadata, and IMU-stream metadata.

uuid.description: Unique identifier assigned by the Tobii Pro Glasses 3 system to the eye-tracker recording session.

name.description: Name assigned to the eye-tracker recording session in the Tobii recording metadata.

meta-folder.description: Name or relative path of the metadata folder associated with the eye-tracker recording.

version.description: Version number of the Tobii recording metadata format.

duration.description: Duration of the eye-tracker recording session.

created.description: Creation timestamp of the eye-tracker recording session as stored in the Tobii metadata.

timezone.description: Timezone associated with the recording creation time.

scenecamera.description: Metadata for the scene-camera video recorded by the Tobii Pro Glasses 3.

file.description: Relative path or filename of the scene-camera video associated with the recording.

snapshots.description: List of scene-camera snapshot images generated for the recording, each with its associated timestamp.

file.description: Relative path or filename of the snapshot image.

time.description: Timestamp of the snapshot, expressed relative to the start of the eye-tracker recording.
time.unit: milliseconds from start of eye-tracker recording

camera-calibration.description: Scene-camera calibration parameters exported by the Tobii Pro Glasses 3 system.

position.description: Three-dimensional position of the scene camera in the eye-tracker coordinate system.

focal-length.description: Focal length parameters of the scene camera along the horizontal and vertical image axes.

rotation.description: Rotation matrix describing the orientation of the scene camera in the eye-tracker coordinate system.

skew.description: Camera skew parameter used in the scene-camera calibration model.

principal-point.description: Principal point of the scene camera in image coordinates.

radial-distortion.description: Radial distortion coefficients of the scene-camera calibration model.

tangential-distortion.description: Tangential distortion coefficients of the scene-camera calibration model.

resolution.description: Resolution of the scene-camera video as width and height.

gaze-overlay.description: Boolean flag indicating whether a gaze overlay is included in the scene-camera video metadata.

eyecameras.description: Metadata entry describing the eye-camera stream or its availability in the Tobii recording export.

gaze.description: Metadata for the gaze-data stream associated with the recording.

file.description: Relative path or filename of the gaze-data JSON Lines file.

samples.description: Total number of gaze samples recorded in the gaze-data stream.

valid-samples.description: Number of gaze samples marked as valid in the Tobii recording metadata.

events.description: Metadata for the eye-tracker event stream associated with the recording.

file.description: Relative path or filename of the eye-tracker event file.

imu.description: Metadata for the inertial measurement unit stream associated with the recording.

file.description: Relative path or filename of the IMU-data JSON Lines file.
